parentText: Very interesting post regarding using Sonnet 4.6 vs Opus 4.6. Looks like Sonnet 4.6 is pretty much just as good and costs less money.

parentText: AI Tip of the Day: Assign a specific persona — start your prompts with "Act as an expert [Job Title]" to shift the AI's tone and depth from generic to professional.
I have a client that tried to import an EDI_820 format file as a payment file. Is this something we support?
latestReplyText: The file they tried wasn't matching other files that had been imported
